name: Crunchyroll
overview: Adds metadata from crunchyroll to your anime collection and shows reviews and comments from users
description: Adds metadata from crunchyroll to your anime collection and shows reviews and comments from users

versions.changelog: A complete rework of the plugin. Now correctly works with MetadataProvider Interfaces and due to Cloudflare protection the plugin requires FlareSolverr now to work.

- Changing FlareSolverr settings does not require a restart of the server anymore
 - Reviews & Comments Features can now be activated again

- Removed restart instruction from FlareSolverr url config
 - Fixed not showing installed version in Plugin-Manager
